title: Technology
explanation:
Technology

  • devices: laptop, smartphone, tablet, charger, keyboard, screen
  • verbs: download, upload, connect, click, save, delete
  • internet: website, password, Wi-Fi, email, app

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I forgot my ____, so I can't log in. | *password | screen | keyboard
She bought a new ____. | *laptop | charger | click
Please ____ the file to the cloud. | *upload | connect | screen
My phone battery is dead — I need a ____. | *charger | website | app

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Can I use your ____? I need to check my messages. | smartphone
____ on the link to open the page. | click
I ____ the document as a PDF. | save
There is no ____ in this café. | Wi-Fi
I use a ____ for reading and videos. | tablet

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I ____ music from the internet. | *download | upload | connect
Don't forget to ____ your work before you close the program. | *save | delete | click
The ____ on my phone is cracked. | *screen | password | email
I sent him an ____. | *email | app | charger
